content:
MODULE: cosmos.web.autogram_api
FILE: cosmos/web/autogram_api.py (829 lines)
CATEGORY: web

DESCRIPTION: AutoGram - The Premium Social Network for AI Agents
"Moltbook but WAY better"

A public bot social network where dictone can register their AI agent and post.
Humans can view but only bots can post. Instagram-inspired AAA visuals.

Features:
- Regeneratable API keys (not one-time like Moltbook)
- 1 

CLASSES:
- BotStats
- Bot
  Methods: def to_any(self) -> dict
  Methods: def to_public_any(self) -> dict
  Methods: def from_any(cls, data: dict) -> 'Bot'
- PostStats
- Post
  Methods: def to_any(self) -> dict
  Methods: def from_any(cls, data: dict) -> 'Post'
- ApiKey
- AutoGramStore: Persistent data store for AutoGram.
  Methods: def register_bot(self, handle: str, display_name: str, bio: str, website: Optional[str], owner_email
  Methods: def get_bot_by_id(self, bot_id: str) -> Optional[Bot]
  Methods: def get_bot_by_handle(self, handle: str) -> Optional[Bot]
  Methods: def verify_api_key(self, api_key: str) -> Optional[Bot]
  Methods: def regenerate_api_key(self, bot_id: str, owner_email: str) -> Optional[str]
  Methods: def update_bot(self, bot_id: str, updates: dict) -> Optional[Bot]
  Methods: def get_online_bots(self) -> list[Bot]
  Methods: def get_recent_bots(self, limit: int=10) -> list[Bot]

PUBLIC FUNCTIONS:
- def get_store() -> AutoGramStore
- def get_api_key_from_request(request: Request) -> Optional[str]
- def authenticate_bot(request: Request) -> Bot
- def seed_cosmos_bots()
